label: The Chroma Sleeper
description: The Chroma Sleeper is a compact lodging chamber set behind the tavern’s faceted service wall, sealed by vitrified tile and scored metalwork to resist Lacrymara’s abrasive glass dust. A shallow prism-pane over the bed refracts the copper-white twilight into fixed bands, while grounded floor gutters draw stray charge into a narrow drain-channel cut through fused silicate. Built-in storage niches are faced with mirror slats aligned to Seamglass Meridian’s auroral geometry, keeping the room’s light orderly and navigationally regular. Furnishings favor slab-stone and riveted metal with easily cleaned edges, emphasizing durability over softness in the hushlit climate.
